title: Why Now Is the Time to Buy Silver Age Comics at Auction
body:
Silver Age Marvel books haven't been this accessible in years. This week's CBB Auctions event brings 40 CGC-graded books to market — all 8.0 or higher — with opening bids set 30% below recent comparables.

For collectors who've been watching prices rise, this is an inflection point. High-grade Silver Age books from this era have appreciated consistently, but auction events with concentration this deep are rare. Usually you're chasing individual books across multiple platforms.

What makes this auction different is the concentration: 40 books from the same era, all graded, all closing in one window. That's a genuine opportunity to build position rather than pick off single issues.

The auction closes Sunday at 10pm ET. No extensions. Free shipping on all winning bids over $200.

Register and place your opening bid before Sunday closes.

metadata.seo_title: Silver Age Comic Auction — CGC Graded Books Starting Below Market
metadata.meta_description: 40 Silver Age Marvel comics, all CGC 8.0+, closing Sunday at 10pm ET. Starting bids 30% below recent comparables.
